pi_items.source: setup_azure_devops.ps1 lines 136-143 creates project named 'TailwindTraders'; line 312 retrieves Git repository with name 'TailwindTraders' as default repo
setup_azure_devops.ps1 line 365 explicitly creates 'refs/heads/main' in initial commit
setup_azure_devops.ps1 does not create a 'develop' branch. Only 'main' and 'feature/add-search-endpoint' are created (lines 365, 386)
setup_azure_devops.ps1 does not create a 'release/v1.0' branch. Only 'main' and 'feature/add-search-endpoint' are created
setup_azure_devops.ps1 does not create 'feature/search-api'. setup_task.ps1 (referenced in pre_task hook line 13) does not exist
setup_azure_devops.ps1 does not create 'feature/user-auth'. setup_task.ps1 is missing
setup_azure_devops.ps1 does not create 'bugfix/price-calc'. setup_task.ps1 is missing
setup_azure_devops.ps1 does not create 'feature/old-dashboard'. setup_task.ps1 is missing
setup_azure_devops.ps1 does not create 'feature/experimental-cache'. setup_task.ps1 is missing

Task description claims 8 branches total (3 to keep + 5 to delete). setup_azure_devops.ps1 only creates 2 branches: 'main' (line 365) and 'feature/add-search-endpoint' (line 386). No setup_task.ps1 exists to create the additional 6 claimed branches
task.json line 13 references 'C:\workspace\tasks\cleanup_stale_branches\setup_task.ps1' in pre_task hook, but file does not exist in filesystem
task.json line 14 references 'C:\workspace\tasks\cleanup_stale_branches\export_result.ps1' in post_task hook, but file does not exist in filesystem

privileged_info_summary: Verified: TailwindTraders project and Git repository exist on Azure DevOps Server, initialized with 'main' branch by setup_azure_devops.ps1. Contradicted: Task metadata claims repository has 8 branches (3 to keep + 5 to delete), but environment setup only creates 2 branches: 'main' and 'feature/add-search-endpoint'. Task claims to keep 'develop' and 'release/v1.0' branches, but neither is created by setup_azure_devops.ps1. Critical failure: Task references pre_task hook setup_task.ps1 and post_task hook export_result.ps1 (task.json lines 13-14), but neither script exists in the repository. Without setup_task.ps1, the 6 claimed branches beyond 'main' and 'feature/add-search-endpoint' cannot be created, making the task impossible to initialize. Without export_result.ps1, the task result cannot be exported to the file expected by verifier.py (C:/Users/Docker/task_results/cleanup_stale_branches_result.json). All metadata claims about the 5 branches to delete are unverifiable due to missing setup script.
